name: Pistachio Whiskey Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant pistachio pudding; 1 serving size
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions, using the recommended amount of eggs and oil. Replace the water with 1/2 cup of water and the whiskey with 3/4 cup of whiskey for the liquid.
2. Blend in the instant pistachio pudding mix.
3. Fold in the chopped Maraschino cherries, walnuts, and chocolate chips.
4. Grease and flour a Bundt pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes.
7. Allow the cake to cool before adding any glaze.
